chain.thought: Explanation: By counting the number of featured guests for each song: "keep hustlin" has 2 (E-40 & Too Short), "cheddar" has 2 (Mack 10 & Ice Cube), "the shadiest one" has 1 (CJ Mac), "can't hold back" has 1 (Ice Cube), "better days" has 1 (Ron Banks), and "like that" has 3 (Ice Cube, Daz Dillinger & CJ Mac). Therefore, "like that" has the most featured guests.

judge_thought: Explanation: The featured guest counts per song show the maximum on "like that," which lists Ice Cube, Daz Dillinger & CJ Mac (3 guests). Other tracks have fewer, e.g., "keep hustlin" (E-40 & Too Short, 2) and "cheddar" (Mack 10 & Ice Cube, 2). Therefore, "like that" has the most featured guests.
